title: chrysanthemum khorasanicum
intro: Chrysanthemum khorasanicum, also known as the Afghan chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Afghanistan. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum khorasanicum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and support overall well-being.
